chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي بِالْقَوْمِ وَ هُوَ عَلَى غَيْرِ طُهْرٍ أَوْ لِغَيْرِ الْقِبْلَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 54 – A man prays Salāt with the people (leading them) and he is upon without cleanliness, or towards other than the Qiblah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/267)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/267)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَحَدَهُمَا ( عليهما السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ صَلَّى بِقَوْمٍ رَكْعَتَيْنِ فَأَخْبَرَهُمْ أَنَّهُ لَمْ يَكُنْ عَلَى وُضُوءٍ قَالَ يُتِمُّ الْقَوْمُ صَلَاتَهُمْ فَإِنَّهُ لَيْسَ عَلَى الْإِمَامِ ضَمَانٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Hadeed, from Jameel, from Zurara who said,

‘I asked one of the two (5th or 6th Imamasws about a man who prays with a group (leading them) in two Rak’at, so he informs them that he did not happen to be upon an ablution. Heasws said: ‘The group would complete their Salāt, for there is no responsibility upon the Imam’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn Hadid from Jamil from Zurarah who has said the following: “I once asked one of the two Imam, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, about a man who leads a people in Salah (prayer) of two Rak‘at and then informs them that he does not have a valid Wudu’. He (the Imam) said, ‘People must complete their Salah (prayer); there is no responsibility on Imam.’”
